bridge_equation_v43.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v43 = mix(B_plastic_v42, L_sys_field_lattice, 1 - P_sys_field_lattice, D_feature_v37, 1 - G_brain_v37)
bridge_equation_v43.structure_term: B_struct_v43 = mix(B_struct_v42, S_sys_field_lattice, R_sys_field_lattice, 1 - P_sys_field_lattice, D_structure_v37)
bridge_equation_v43.readiness_term: R_train_v43 = mix(R_train_v42, B_plastic_v43, B_struct_v43, R_sys_field_lattice, D_align_v37, 1 - P_sys_field_lattice)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v43 checks whether systemic low-risk field lattice begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more regular field-like way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this lattice-like low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
